text: A violation of Section 1808.45, relating to unauthorized disclosure of department records, is a misdemeanor, and not an infraction.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 1. Offenses [40000.1 - 40273]
#### Article 1. Violation of Code [40000.1 - 40008]
##### § 40000.61

A violation of Section 1808.45, relating to unauthorized disclosure of department records, is a misdemeanor, and not an infraction.

*(Added by Stats. 1989, Ch. 1213, Sec. 18.)*

subsections.text: A violation of Section 1808.45, relating to unauthorized disclosure of department records, is a misdemeanor, and not an infraction.
